backdrop.$description: Backdrop layer controls for the photographic app surface. Load-bearing for contrast: they cap how much of the photo reaches content, which bounds the worst-case backdrop behind translucent panels. check-contrast.mjs verifies text stays AA over the bounded backdrop in both modes. Consumed by photography-to-ui; the docs catalog demonstrates the caps live over the banner photo (brain is pinned dark).

photo-opacity.$description: Dark: photograph is prominent over the canvas scrim floor

tint-opacity.$description: Dark: brand gradient + glow tint strength over the photo
